name: Kaiser Wilhelm II
quote: I no longer recognize parties; I recognize only Germans.

name: Field Marshal Douglas Haig
quote: Every position must be held to the last man: there must be no retirement. With our backs to the wall and believing in the justice of our cause each one of us must fight on to the end.

name: Marshal Ferdinand Foch
quote: This is not a peace treaty. It is an armistice for twenty years.

name: General Philippe Pétain
role: Defender of Verdun; French Army Commander 1917
quote: They shall not pass.

name: General Erich von Falkenhayn
role: German Chief of Staff; Architect of Battle of Verdun
quote: Within our reach behind the French sector of the Western Front there are objectives for the retention of which the French General Staff would be compelled to throw in every man they have. If they do so the forces of France will bleed to death.

name: General Erich Ludendorff
role: First Quartermaster General; Germany's de facto military dictator 1916–18
quote: August 8th was the black day of the German Army in the history of this war.

name: Field Marshal Paul von Hindenburg
role: German Chief of Staff; Hero of Tannenberg
quote: The German Army was stabbed in the back.

name: President Woodrow Wilson
quote: The world must be made safe for democracy. Its peace must be planted upon the tested foundations of political liberty.

name: General John 'Black Jack' Pershing
quote: Lafayette, we are here.

name: David Lloyd George
quote: This war is not being fought for Serbia, or Belgium; we are fighting for civilization itself.

name: Sir Edward Grey
quote: The lamps are going out all over Europe; we shall not see them lit again in our lifetime.

name: Winston Churchill
quote: The wars of peoples will be more terrible than those of kings.

name: Tsar Nicholas II
quote: I have a firm, absolute conviction that the destiny of Russia, my own fate, and the fate of the Russian Imperial Family are bound up with the fate of this war.

name: Vladimir Lenin
role: Leader of the Bolshevik Revolution; Head of Soviet Government
quote: The imperialist war is the eve of the socialist revolution.

name: Mustafa Kemal (Atatürk)
role: Ottoman Commander at Gallipoli; later founder of Turkey
quote: I am not ordering you to attack. I am ordering you to die. In the time that passes until we die, other troops and commanders can come forward and take our places.

name: Georges Clemenceau
quote: War is too serious a matter to be left to the military.

name: General Joseph Joffre
role: French Commander-in-Chief (1914–1916); Victor of the Marne
quote: I don't know who won the Battle of the Marne, but I know that whoever lost it was not me.

name: T.E. Lawrence
role: British Intelligence Officer; Lawrence of Arabia
quote: All men dream, but not equally. Those who dream by night in the dusty recesses of their minds wake in the day to find it was vanity; but the dreamers of the day are dangerous men, for they may act their dream with open eyes to make it possible.

name: General John Monash
quote: A perfected modern battle plan is like nothing so much as a score for an orchestral composition.

name: Gavrilo Princip
role: Bosnian Serb nationalist; Assassin of Franz Ferdinand
quote: I am a Yugoslav nationalist, aiming for the unification of all Yugoslavs, and I do not care what form of state, but it must be freed from Austria.

name: Archduke Franz Ferdinand
quote: Whatever our Lord God wishes, I am prepared for all things.

name: Field Marshal Lord Kitchener
role: British Secretary of State for War (1914–1916)
quote: Your Country Needs You.
